message.content:
@startuml
actor User
participant "CellEditor" as CellEditor #D3D3D3 
participant Address  #D3D3D3  
participant Controller   #D3D3D3   
participant Cell    #D3D3D3    
participant CellImpl     #D3D3D3     
participant FormulaCompiler      #D3D3D3      
participant ExcelExpressionCompiler       #D3D3D5       
participant ANTLRStringStream        #FFFFFF        
participant FormulaLexer         #FFFFFF         
participant CommonTokenStream          #FFFFFF          
participant FormulaParser           #FFFFFF           
participant Expression            #FFFFFF            
participant Formula             #FFFFFF             
User ->> CellEditor : Inputs block of instructions\nactivate CellEditor \nCellEditor->>+Address:address = getAddress()\nCellEditor->>+Controller:cell=getCell(address)\nnote right of Controller:this can be null if cell does not exist yet\ndeactivate address dectivate controller\nCellEditor->>+Cell:setContent(content) activate Cell note left of Cell this creates a new cell in case there was none deactivate Cell\nCell-->+Cellimpl:setcontent(cell,content)note over call impl#ffffffthis stores content into memorydeactivatesetupcallformula compilercompileexpressionconverttreebacktoexcel formatreturnresultshow()endusecaseUC1as\"Set Content\"\n@enduml
